Outdoor Sporting Goods Pallet
summary: One pallet of mixed-brand outdoor sporting goods covering camping, hiking, fishing, and outdoor recreation. Inspected returns and overstock built for outdoor specialty stores, camping vendors, and eBay power sellers working the category by the pallet.

title: Mixed Shoes Pallet, 110 Pairs
summary: 110 pairs of mixed-brand footwear, athletic, casual, dress, sandals, and boots, across men's, women's, and kids' sizing at $8.18 per pair. Original shoeboxes on most pairs. Inspected stock for shoe boutiques and Poshmark or Mercari resellers.

title: Return Mail Mystery Package Pallet
summary: One pallet of mixed-item return-mail mystery packages aggregated across USPS, UPS, and FedEx return flow, typically 100 to 250+ parcels in original carrier packaging. Built for bin store operators, mystery-event vendors, and unboxing creators.

title: Amazon LPN Mixed Apparel Pallet, 2,000 Pieces
summary: LPN-sourced Amazon apparel pallet of 1,000 to 2,000 individually packaged pieces, mixed men's and women's with swimwear included, at $1,600 per pallet. Strong volume economics for mixed-gender apparel resellers running packaged inventory.

title: Nordstrom House Brands Apparel Pallet, 900 Pieces
summary: 900 pieces of Nordstrom house-brand apparel, BP., Caslon, Halogen, and Treasure & Bond, at $5.56 per piece. A premium department-store mix for contemporary boutiques and Poshmark or Mercari resellers working specialty-store names.

title: Amazon Essentials Clothing Pallet, 650 Units
summary: Roughly 650 pieces of Amazon Essentials, Amazon's in-house everyday-apparel line, at $1.40 per piece. A single-brand pallet with consistent secondary-market demand, built for resellers targeting the Amazon Essentials label specifically.

title: Mixed Cosmetics Pallet, 200 Units
summary: 200 units of mixed-brand drugstore and mid-tier cosmetics, foundation, eye, lip, and cheek products, at $3.40 per unit. Inspected new, shelf-pull, and overstock stock with strong resale margins for bin stores and live beauty sellers.

title: Mixed Cosmetics Pallet, 150 Units
summary: 150 units of mixed-brand cosmetics, foundation, eye, lip, and cheek products across drugstore and mid-tier names, at $3.67 per unit in sealed retail packaging. A lower-entry tier for first-time bin store and Mercari beauty resellers.

title: Mixed Cosmetics Pallet, 100 Units
summary: 100 units of brand-name beauty, color cosmetics, skincare, haircare, and bath items from major drugstore and big-box aisles, at roughly $4 per unit. A medium tier for sellers past a starter box but short of a full truckload.

title: Mixed Cosmetics Pallet, 50 Units
summary: 50 sealed units of color cosmetics, skincare, and haircare from recognizable drugstore and big-box brands at about $4.60 apiece. The entry point into beauty resale, sized to test a live show or fill a market table without tying up cash.

title: Mixed Perfume Pallet, 200 Units
summary: 200 units of mixed-brand fragrance, designer-style EDT and EDP, body sprays, mists, rollerballs, and gift sets across men's, women's, and unisex, at roughly $5 per bottle. High-margin inventory with depth for continuous listings.

title: Mixed Perfume Pallet, 150 Units
summary: 150 units of mixed-brand fragrance, Coty, Calvin Klein, and Bath & Body Works, across 1oz to 3.4oz bottles in sealed retail packaging at $5.67 per unit. A lower-entry tier for fragrance boutiques and Whatnot live sellers.

title: Mixed Perfume Pallet, 180 Units
summary: 180 units of fragrance weighted toward fast-moving body sprays, mists, rollerballs, and travel minis, anchored by designer-style EDT and EDP, at about $5.50 per bottle. Built for market vendors and live sellers who move on price and volume.

title: Lululemon Clothes Pallet, 280 Units NWT
summary: 280 units of authentic new-with-tags Lululemon activewear at $5.00 per piece. A manifested mid-tier pallet in a brand where individual-piece resale routinely lands $35 to $95, built for activewear specialty sellers.

title: Lululemon Activewear Pallet, 150 Units
summary: An entry-tier manifested pallet of 150 units of authentic, new-with-tags Lululemon activewear. Strong volume economics for resellers testing the brand-specialty model by the pallet or truckload.

title: Mixed Shoes Pallet, 200 Pairs
summary: 200 pairs of inspected mixed footwear: athletic and running, sneakers, casual and dress, plus seasonal styles across men's, women's, and kids' sizes. Overstock, shelf-pull, and clean returns, mostly new or near-new.

title: Mixed Toy Pallet, 200 Units
summary: 200 mixed toys spanning action figures, dolls, board games, puzzles, plush, and activity sets across every price tier. Overstock, shelf-pull, and clean returns in retail packaging, built for fourth-quarter holiday volume.

title: Mixed Toy Pallet, 150 Units (Large Lot)
summary: 150 units skewed toward branded and licensed toys: figures, vehicles, play sets, mid and large-format games, building sets, and premium plush. Overstock, shelf-pull, and clean returns that resell year-round, not just the holidays.

title: Mixed Electronics Pallet, 200 Units
summary: 200 consumer-electronics units: headphones, earbuds, speakers, soundbars, chargers, cables, power banks, plus smart-home and small devices. Mixed overstock, shelf-pull, and returns, so a share ships sealed and a share needs testing.

title: Electronics Pallet, 150 Units (Large Lot)
summary: A device-weighted lot of 150 units leaning toward headphones, earbuds, speakers, wearables, tablets, streaming, and smart-home gear. Overstock, shelf-pull, and returns, built for the reseller scaling tested-electronics volume.

title: Electronics Pallet, 150 Units (Medium Lot)
summary: A value-tier lot of 150 units weighted toward chargers, cables, cases, power banks, hubs, entry audio, and small smart-home gadgets. Overstock, shelf-pull, and returns that test fast and ship cheap for newer resellers.

title: Kitchen Appliance Pallet, 200 Units
summary: 200 small countertop appliances: air fryers, toaster ovens, blenders, food processors, mixers, coffee makers, espresso machines, and specialty electrics. Overstock, shelf-pull, and returns, with many units sealed and returns needing a quick power-on test.

title: Kitchen Appliance Pallet, 150 Units (Large Lot)
summary: 150 small electrics weighted toward mid-size, branded countertop pieces: air fryers, multi-cookers, full-size blenders and stand mixers, plus drip, pod, and espresso machines. Overstock, shelf-pull, and returns for the reseller scaling past a first buy.

title: Kitchen Appliance Pallet, 120 Units (Medium Lot)
summary: A starter lot of 120 compact countertop electrics: air fryers, toasters, single-serve cookers, personal blenders, hand mixers, coffee makers, kettles, and pod machines across recognizable brands. Overstock, shelf-pull, and returns that are easy to test and move.

title: Milwaukee Tools Pallet, 150 Units
summary: A 150-unit Milwaukee lot built around M18 and M12 cordless drills, drivers, and impact tools, plus batteries, chargers, bare tools, hand tools, and jobsite gear. Overstock, shelf-pull, and returns, with cordless units to test and batteries to check on intake.

title: Milwaukee Tools Pallet, 150 Units (Large Lot)
summary: A broad 150-unit Milwaukee mix spanning M18 and M12 cordless tools, hand tools, accessories, blades, bits, storage, and jobsite gear. Overstock, shelf-pull, and returns offering more listings and price points from the trusted red brand.

title: Milwaukee Tools Pallet, 100 Units (Medium Lot)
summary: A 100-unit Milwaukee mix of M18 and M12 cordless tools and drivers, batteries, chargers, bare tools, hand tools, and accessories. Overstock, shelf-pull, and returns in a contained lot sized to break into trade-tool resale before scaling.

title: DeWalt Tools Pallet, 200 Units
summary: A 200-unit DeWalt lot built around 20V MAX and FLEXVOLT cordless drills, drivers, and saws, plus batteries, chargers, bare tools, hand tools, accessories, and jobsite gear. Overstock, shelf-pull, and returns, with cordless units to function-test on intake.

title: DeWalt Tools Pallet, 150 Units
summary: A broad DeWalt mix of 150 units for $1,700, blending 20V MAX cordless tools and drivers with hand tools, bits, blades, and jobsite gear. Inspected liquidation built to give tool resellers wide listings and price points across one of the most-searched names in tools.

title: Ryobi Tools Pallet, 200 Units
summary: A 200-unit Ryobi wholesale lot at $1,750, under $9 a piece. ONE+ 18V drills, drivers, saws, and yard tools alongside bare tools, batteries, chargers, hand tools, and accessories. Inspected stock built for the deep DIY and homeowner resale market.

title: Ryobi Tools Pallet, 150 Units
summary: A 150-unit Ryobi lot at $1,250, about $8.30 a piece. Pairs ONE+ 18V cordless tools with batteries, chargers, hand tools, accessories, and seasonal gear, inspected and sold for high-volume DIY resellers serving the ONE+ ecosystem.

title: MacBook Air Liquidation Pallet, Apple Laptops
summary: A wholesale Apple laptop lot at $1,800, built for refurbishers and tech resellers who test, grade, and recondition. Assorted MacBook Air models across recent generations, mixed Intel and Apple-silicon units, sold as-is from overstock and customer-return channels.

title: Mixed-Brand Sneakers Pallet, 60 to 80 Pairs
summary: 60 to 80 pairs of authentic sneakers spanning Nike, Adidas, Puma, New Balance, Reebok, Asics, Skechers, Vans, and Converse, priced at $1,100 (roughly $14 to $18 per pair). Broad-spectrum variety built for bin-store, swap-meet, and warehouse-sale operators.

title: iPhone 14 Pro Max Pallet, 150 Units
summary: A $2,500 wholesale lot of 150 Apple iPhone 14 Pro Max handsets across storage capacities from 256GB to 1TB and mixed finishes. An as-is refurbisher buy: test each unit, verify IMEI and Activation Lock, and sort into resale, repair, and parts tiers.

title: Authentic Air Jordan Sneakers Pallet, 90 Pairs
summary: 90 verified-authentic pairs of Air Jordan retros and signature silhouettes for $1,300, about $14.44 per pair. Built from US department-store overstock and shelf-pull recoveries for resellers chasing the strongest per-pair spread in mainstream sneakers.

title: Home Depot Tool Pallet, 40 to 45 Units
summary: A single Home Depot pallet of 40 to 45 mixed tools across Ryobi, DeWalt, Milwaukee, Ridgid, and other brands at $1,400, roughly $32.56 per unit. Inspected stock for tool resellers, hardware retailers, and repair shops testing the category before truckload volume.

title: Women's Handbags and Purses Pallet
summary: A $900 lot of women's bags, purses, and totes spanning crossbody, shoulder, clutches, wristlets, backpacks, and carryalls across colors and price tiers. Inspected overstock, shelf-pull, and clean returns in a season-proof, size-free category that ships easy.

title: Mixed-Brand Power Tools Pallet
summary: A $750 mixed-brand lot spanning corded and cordless drills, drivers, saws, and grinders across the major tool makers, plus bare tools, batteries, chargers, hand tools, and accessories. Inspected overstock, shelf-pull, and returns for a lower entry into tool flipping.

title: Toilet Paper Pallet, 1,920 Rolls
summary: 1,920 rolls of bath tissue for $550, about 29 cents a roll, in bulk and multipack retail formats across standard and value brands. Sealed overstock with no expiry and no testing, a dependable, fast-moving commodity for value resellers and bin stores.

title: Baby Diapers Pallet, 90 Boxes
summary: 90 boxes of baby diapers for $800, spanning sizes from newborn through toddler across brand and store-label product. Sealed overstock and shelf-pull, a steady, price-insensitive essential for value resellers, daycares, and small retailers serving families.

title: Artificial Christmas Trees Pallet, 50 Trees
summary: 50 boxed artificial Christmas trees for $800, about $16 each, in a mix of sizes and styles with pre-lit and unlit units possible. Boxed overstock and shelf-pull that ships and stores flat, a timed seasonal buy for pop-up vendors and seasonal retailers.

title: Victoria's Secret Perfume Pallet, 280 Units
summary: 280 units of Victoria's Secret body mists, fragrance sprays, eau de parfum, and rollerballs for $1,000, about $3.57 apiece. Inspected overstock and shelf-pull, mostly sealed, name-driven impulse inventory that moves fast across live and social channels.

title: Wholesale Cat Food Pallet (45 Bags)
summary: A pallet of 45 bags of dry cat food across mixed brands and life-stage formulas at $650. A recession-proof pet staple with repeat demand, sized for discount pet shops, rescues, and value retailers.

title: Wholesale Dog Food Pallet (40 Bags)
summary: Forty bags of dry dog food in mixed brands and life-stage formulas, priced at $600 by the pallet. A defined-count lot of a fast-moving staple for value resellers and small retailers serving pet owners.

title: Wholesale Dog Toys Pallet (500 Units)
summary: Five hundred packaged dog toys, chew, rope, plush, squeaky, and fetch, across sizes for $750, roughly $1.50 a unit. A high-margin impulse category that keeps a pet storefront or market table stocked.

title: Wholesale Dog Food Pallet (50 Bags & Cases)
summary: Fifty bags and cases of dry dog food in mixed brands and life-stage formulas for $625. A larger defined-count lot of a recession-proof staple for resellers moving pet food at volume.

title: Air Jordan Liquidation Pallet (50 Pairs)
summary: Fifty pairs of authentic Air Jordans, brand new in original boxes, for $650, about $13 a pair. An entry-tier sneaker buy with uniform new-in-box condition for first-time Jordan resellers and weekend vendors.

title: High-End Makeup Liquidation Pallet (200+ Items)
summary: Over 200 premium cosmetics, prestige foundations, palettes, lip, eye, and skincare from department-store and specialty brands, for $650, about $3.25 an item. Prestige-tier beauty with resale spread a mass-market lot cannot match.

title: Zara Apparel Liquidation Pallet (500 Pieces)
summary: Five hundred pieces of Zara women's and men's apparel, tops, dresses, knitwear, trousers, and outerwear, for $1,200, under $2.40 a garment. Trend-forward fashion with built-in name recognition for boutique and volume resellers.

title: Target Liquidation Pallet, Entry Tier
summary: A single Target liquidation pallet of cross-category general merchandise at $550, the lowest-cost Target entry point in the catalog. Built for first-time Target buyers, side-hustle resellers, and bin-store operators testing the category.

title: Wholesale Makeup Products Pallet
summary: An assorted cosmetics pallet at $500, complexion, eye, brow, lip, and cheek products plus beauty tools from US retail channels. A balanced mid-tier lot with enough variety to stock a cosmetics store and cross-sell easily.

title: Wholesale Bedding Pallet
summary: A home-textiles pallet at $400, sheet sets, comforters, quilts, duvet covers, blankets, and protectors across sizes from twin to king. An everyday essential with broad demand for value resellers and home-goods sellers.

title: Wholesale Winter Jacket Pallet
summary: A seasonal outerwear pallet at $800, insulated and puffer jackets, parkas, coats, and shells for men, women, and kids across sizes. The highest-ticket apparel category, with demand that spikes hard each fall and winter.

title: Wholesale Mixed Pet Food Pallet
summary: A mixed dog and cat food pallet at $500 covering dry formulas across sizes plus treats and consumables in rotation. One buy that serves both major pet categories, ideal for a general pet-focused value operation.

title: Mixed Underwear & Basics Pallet
summary: A new, packaged intimates pallet at $500, men's and women's underwear, briefs, bras, and bralettes across sizes and styles. A clean, hygiene-appropriate everyday-essential buy for value and basics resellers.

title: Wholesale Baby Diapers Pallet (50 Cases)
summary: Fifty cases of baby diapers, mixed sizes from newborn through toddler, across brand and store-label stock for $500. A sealed, fast-moving baby essential with constant demand for value resellers, daycares, and small retailers.

title: Women's Underwear Pallet (500 Pieces)
summary: 500 pieces of new, packaged women's intimates: briefs, panties, bras, bralettes, and lingerie across mixed sizes and styles. At $800 the pallet, that's about $1.60 a piece. Sealed, hygiene-appropriate stock for high-volume basics resellers.

title: Victoria's Secret Underwear Pallet (1,100 Pieces)
summary: 1,100 pieces of new, packaged Victoria's Secret and PINK intimates: panties, briefs, bras, bralettes, and loungewear in mixed sizes. At $1,400 the pallet, under $1.30 a piece. A specialty-brand name that moves faster than generic intimates.

title: Stanley Tumblers Wholesale Pallet
summary: A pallet of Stanley insulated tumblers and travel mugs in assorted sizes, colors, and finishes, overstock and shelf-pull condition. Priced at $400 the pallet. A name-driven drinkware lot that turns fast on live and social channels.

title: Wholesale Electronics Pallet
summary: A value-priced consumer-electronics pallet of audio, accessories, and small devices: headphones, earbuds, speakers, chargers, cables, power banks, and smart-home gadgets. $550 the pallet, mixed overstock, shelf-pull, and return condition. Test and grade on intake.

title: Apple iPad Pallet
summary: A wholesale pallet of assorted Apple iPad models across recent generations, mixed storage sizes and finishes, sold as-is across working, cosmetic, and repair-candidate units. Priced at $1,400. A refurbisher buy; verify Activation Lock on every tablet.

title: Mixed-Brand Laptop Pallet
summary: A wholesale pallet of mixed-brand laptops across recent generations, Windows with Chromebook and Apple units in rotation, sold as-is in working, cosmetic, and repair-candidate grades. $1,400 the pallet. A refurbisher buy for resellers with a test bench.

title: Liquidation Cosmetics Pallet
summary: An assorted beauty pallet of color cosmetics, skincare, haircare, tools, and bath items from US retail channels, mostly sealed shelf-pull and overstock. Priced at $550. Broad variety to stock a beauty store for live and social selling.

title: Authentic Nike Sneakers Pallet (125 Pairs)
summary: 125 pairs of authentic, inspected Nike sneakers in a mixed-grade lot, priced at $1,500 the pallet, or roughly $12 a pair. Broad-brand footwear inventory for bin stores, swap meets, and online shoe sellers.

title: UGG Shoes Pallet (150 Pairs)
summary: 150 pairs of UGG footwear, classic sheepskin boots, slippers, and casual styles in men's, women's, and kids' sizes, overstock and clean-return condition. At $1,400 the pallet, about $9.30 a pair. Inspect and verify authenticity before resale.

title: Countertop Microwave Pallet
summary: A wholesale pallet of countertop microwave ovens in assorted sizes, brands, and wattages, overstock, shelf-pull, and return condition. Priced at $1,400. Power-test on intake; a steady appliance category for local and value resale channels.

title: Mixed TV Pallet (10 TVs, 32 to 85 Inches)
summary: 10 mixed televisions ranging 32 to 85 inches across brands and panel types, working, cosmetic, and repair-candidate sets, overstock and return condition. At $900 the pallet, about $90 a set. Power-test on intake; high-ticket local-sale inventory.

title: Apple MacBook Pallet (10 to 20 Units)
summary: 10 to 20 Apple MacBook Air and Pro laptops spanning Intel and Apple-silicon generations, sold as-is across working, cosmetic, and repair-candidate grades. From $1,900. A refurbisher buy; verify Activation Lock and recondition before resale.

title: Ladies Swimwear Pallet (315 Pieces)
summary: 315 pieces of ladies swimwear in assorted sizes: one-pieces, bikinis, tankinis, and cover-ups across mixed styles and prints, overstock and clean-return condition. At $945 the pallet, about $3 a piece. A seasonal category to stock ahead of summer.

title: Razor and Cartridge Sets Pallet (600 Pieces)
summary: 600 sealed razor-and-cartridge shaving sets, men's and women's grooming razors with replacement cartridges and accessories, overstock and shelf-pull condition. At $1,500 the pallet, about $2.50 a set. A high-repeat grooming staple that ships small.

title: The Creme Shop Assorted Makeup Beauty Pallet
summary: A wholesale-scale lot of 10,000 assorted The Creme Shop pieces: sheet masks, lip masks, lip color, skincare treatments, beauty accessories, and licensed-character collabs. Mostly sealed shelf-pull and overstock, built for bin-store operators and subscription-box assemblers moving K-beauty at volume.

title: The Creme Shop Assorted K-Beauty Pallet
summary: 10,000 assorted The Creme Shop K-beauty pieces: sheet masks, lip products, cosmetics, licensed-character and seasonal collabs, and accessories. Mostly sealed shelf-pull and overstock, tailor-made for live and social sellers who need months of variety-driven show inventory.

title: The Creme Shop Wholesale K-Beauty Pallet
summary: A 10,000-piece The Creme Shop lot of sealed, branded SKUs: sheet masks, lip masks, lip color, treatments, skincare, collab pieces, and tools. Mostly sealed shelf-pull and overstock, suited to online and marketplace sellers listing searchable beauty at scale.

title: The Creme Shop Assorted Makeup Lot, 5000 Pcs
summary: 5,000 assorted The Creme Shop K-beauty pieces: sheet masks, lip masks, lip color, skincare, collab and character pieces, and tools. Mostly sealed shelf-pull and overstock, a half-scale entry for growing bin-stores and beauty sellers scaling into wholesale volume.

title: Assorted Squishmallows Plush Pallet, 210 Pcs
summary: 210 assorted Squishmallows plush in different sizes, with varied characters and squad themes, common pieces, plus the occasional rare or retired character. Overstock and shelf-pull, mostly retail-tagged, carrying built-in collector-driven resale demand by character and size.

title: Recognized-Brand Plus-Size Womens Apparel Pallet, 300 Pcs
summary: 300 pieces of recognized-brand plus-size womens apparel: tops, bottoms, dresses, and outerwear in an extended size range. Overstock, shelf-pull, and clean returns with new-with-tags and like-new mixed, targeting one of the most underserved segments in apparel resale.

title: Maelys Cosmetics Body-Care Lot
summary: A wholesale lot of Maelys, the viral direct-to-consumer body-care brand: body creams, tightening and firming gels, treatment products, skincare, and bath and body pieces. Sealed overstock and shelf-pull condition with strong name-search demand. Check dating on intake.

title: Assorted Electric Scooters Pallet
summary: A wholesale lot of assorted electric scooters across a mix of brands and models, including working, cosmetic, and repair-candidate units. Overstock and customer-return condition sold as-is. Charge and test each unit on intake; even non-working scooters carry parts value.

title: Target TG19 Unmanifested Single Pallet
summary: A single unopened, unmanifested Target pallet with contents unknown until intake. Expect cross-category general merchandise typical of Target single-pallet inventory, and Sterilite plastic storage totes may be included in the load.

title: Target TG13 Unmanifested Single Pallet
summary: A single unopened, unmanifested Target pallet, contents unknown until intake. Expect cross-category general merchandise typical of Target single-pallet inventory, with Sterilite plastic storage totes possibly included in the load.

summary: A single unopened, unmanifested Target pallet sold sight-unseen until intake. Expect cross-category general merchandise typical of Target single-pallet inventory, and Sterilite plastic storage totes may be included in the load.

title: Deluxe Mail Liquidation Pallet
summary: A premium tier of undelivered and returned parcels weighted toward higher-retail boxes, a cross-category mix with bigger-ticket items possible in original packaging. Unmanifested single pallet, wrapped and freight-ready, with condition spanning new, open-box, and customer return.

title: Wen Haircare Wholesale Lot
summary: A wholesale lot of Wen, the Chaz Dean brand known for sulfate-free cleansing conditioners: cleansing conditioners, treatments, and styling products across a mix of formulas and sizes. Sealed overstock and shelf-pull condition with strong name-driven demand. Check dating on intake.

summary: The larger tier of wholesale Wen cleansing conditioners, treatments, and styling products, with more depth per formula across a mix of sizes. Sealed overstock and shelf-pull condition, built for resellers running continuous Wen listings or supplying salons. Check dating on intake.

title: Mixed Tires Lot (10 Total)
summary: Ten assorted tires across mixed sizes and brands, in new, takeoff, and used condition. Inspect tread, sidewalls, and date codes, then grade and resell to local buyers by the pair or matched set.

title: Auto Parts Pallet, Heavy in Car Parts
summary: A mixed pallet weighted toward automotive parts and accessories, spanning interior, exterior, and maintenance items across multiple brands. Inspected overstock and returns for resellers serving DIY and repair buyers who shop by part number and fitment.

title: BJ's Limited-SKU Food Pallet
summary: A concentrated grocery pallet from BJ's Wholesale Club, weighted toward fewer SKUs in club-size and multipack depth rather than broad variety. Sealed overstock and shelf-pull for resellers moving specific bulk items in volume.

title: BJ's Stacked General Merchandise Pallet
summary: A tall, high-volume mixed pallet from BJ's Wholesale Club, stacked to maximize product per pallet. Household, seasonal, soft goods, and smalls in club and retail packaging, inspected for bin-store and by-the-piece resale.

title: BJ's Seasonal Merchandise Pallet
summary: Seasonal goods from BJ's Wholesale Club, spanning holiday and party decor, entertaining, and gift items. Inspected overstock and shelf-pull for resellers who buy ahead and sell hard into the peak window.

title: BJ's Household Pallet, Mid Tier
summary: A deeper household pallet from BJ's Wholesale Club, carrying cleaning, paper, kitchen, and storage essentials in club-size and multipack formats. Inspected overstock and returns for steady, recession-resistant value-channel resale.

title: BJ's Household Pallet, Mid-Range
summary: A mid-range household pallet from BJ's Wholesale Club with cleaning, paper, kitchen, and home essentials in club and multipack formats. Inspected overstock and shelf-pull for bin stores and discount retailers restocking everyday goods.

title: BJ's Household Pallet, Entry Tier
summary: An entry-priced household pallet from BJ's Wholesale Club, covering cleaning, paper, kitchen, and storage essentials in club-size and multipack formats. Inspected overstock and returns, broad-appeal inventory that lists and bundles easily.

title: VEVOR Unboxed Tools and Equipment Pallet
summary: A single-brand VEVOR pallet of tools, equipment, and accessories spanning home, shop, restaurant, and outdoor gear. Unboxed overstock and returns, inspect and test on intake, then resell the searchable VEVOR name across multiple price points.

title: Billiards Table Plus Game-Room Items
summary: A pool table with related game-room items and accessories, sold as-is from overstock or returns. A high-ticket local-sale fixture for game rooms, bars, and rec spaces, inspect rails, felt, and cues before resale.

title: Gaylord Pallet, Bulk Mixed Merchandise
summary: A gaylord-size container of bulk assorted merchandise, packing high piece counts of small-to-medium items across home, accessories, and general goods. Unmanifested overstock and returns for resellers who profit on volume and variety.

title: BJ's Smalls High-Piece-Count Pallet
summary: A high-piece-count pallet of small-format items from BJ's Wholesale Club, mixing general merchandise, health, beauty, and household smalls. Inspected overstock and returns built to maximize unit count for bin stores pricing by the each.

summary: A mixed parcel-return pallet running heavy in apparel, built from undelivered and returned shipments plus overstock. Mixed men's, women's, and kids clothing across tops, bottoms, loungewear, and outerwear, a low cost-basis entry into ready-to-flip garments.

title: Large Liquidation Pallet, Higher-Retail Mix
summary: A high-value pallet of mixed general merchandise weighted toward bigger-ticket, higher-retail items across many categories. Unmanifested overstock and returns for resellers chasing stronger per-piece recovery and the higher-value finds.

title: BJ's Christmas & Easter Seasonal Pallet
summary: A BJ's Wholesale Club pallet of dual-holiday seasonal merchandise: Christmas decor, gifts, Easter and spring goods, and party items. One buy gives resellers two demand windows to sell into at $440.

title: Double-Stacked Mixed Merchandise Pallet
summary: Roughly two pallets of mixed general merchandise stacked into one load: home, kitchen, accessories, toys, seasonal, and small electronics. Unmanifested and built for resellers who want maximum piece count and variety at $270.

title: Craft & Sewing Supplies Pallet
summary: A focused pallet of craft and sewing inventory: thread, needles, bobbins, trims, fabric, yarn, and maker tools. Inspected and ready for quilters, sewists, and craft-fair vendors at $270 by the pallet.

title: Temu Overstock & Returns Pallet
summary: A high-piece-count pallet of mixed Temu-style overstock and returns: small gadgets, electronic accessories, home and kitchen items, jewelry, tools, and novelty goods. Priced at $810 for resellers who move volume through bin stores.

title: Stacked Undelivered Mail Parcel Pallet
summary: Undelivered and returned parcels stacked into one high-count load, each box a separate order in original packaging. Cross-category mix of electronics, home, beauty, toys, and accessories at $800 for unboxing-driven resale.

title: BJ's Soft Goods Pallet
summary: A BJ's Wholesale Club pallet of textiles, apparel, and home soft goods: clothing, bedding, towels, and fabric items in club and multipack formats. Easy to handle and sell broadly at $220 by the pallet.

title: Plastic Fuel Tanks Wholesale Lot
summary: A parts-driven lot of replacement plastic fuel tanks in mixed sizes and fitments for automotive, marine, powersports, and small-equipment use. Inspected overstock and shelf-pull stock at $310 for parts resellers who match by fitment.

title: BJ's Christmas Apparel Pallet
summary: A BJ's Wholesale Club lot of Christmas-themed apparel: festive sweaters, pajamas, family sets, and holiday clothing for men, women, and kids. A larger seasonal buy at $728 built for the November-into-December window.

title: Articulated 3D Printed Dragons Lot
summary: A novelty lot of articulated, flexible 3D printed dragons in mixed colors and sizes. Lightweight impulse fidget toys that photograph well for short-form video, priced at $445 for live sellers and gift-shop resellers.

title: Hair Tools Pallet
summary: A focused beauty pallet of powered styling tools: blow dryers, flat irons, curling wands, clippers, trimmers, and accessories across assorted brands. Inspected new, shelf-pull, and return stock at $270 by the pallet.

title: Kitchen Sink Pallet (11 Units)
summary: Eleven kitchen sinks in one home-improvement lot: single-bowl, double-bowl, and assorted mount types across stainless, composite, and other materials. A known count at $380, roughly $35 per fixture for remodelers and contractors.

title: Small White Christmas Trees Pallet
summary: A seasonal pallet of small white artificial Christmas trees in assorted compact sizes, boxed and display-ready. Tabletop and accent styles for apartments and offices, priced at $300 to stock ahead of the holiday window.

title: Hardware Pallet, Hundreds of Items
summary: A high-count hardware lot of hundreds of small home-improvement items: fasteners, fittings, brackets, fixtures, hand tools, and accessories. Mostly new and shelf-pull stock at $270, easy to price by the piece or by the bin.

title: Mixed Consumer Electronics Pallet
summary: A high-retail pallet of assorted consumer electronics, gadgets, and accessories: possible audio, smart-home, lighting, and small devices. Sold as-is and worth testing on arrival, where a few working units can carry the $520 pallet.
